value_chain_position: Specialty manufacturer of vascular surgery devices (grafts, patches, catheters, valves) for open and endovascular procedures; sells single-use implants to vascular surgeons.
relative_comps: LeMaitre occupies a focused niche in open vascular surgery devices with minimal direct public-company competition at its scale — most large-device players have abandoned open surgery for endovascular. This creates a durable niche moat: LeMaitre is often the only qualified supplier for certain grafts. Revenue CAGR of 15.6% and FCF margin of 31% are exceptional for a small-cap device company. Against Terumo and Getinge, LeMaitre competes on specialized product lines rather than scale. The genomics_bio_tools tag is a loose fit — this is surgical consumables, not genomics instrumentation — but qualifies as medical-instruments/supplies picks-and-shovels.
